§7Guide Book #22§r
§lBook Curserer§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Curserer, Summoner, Spellcaster, Magical, Illager, Humanoid, Monster.
•§lSpawns in§r: All overworld surfaces, Underground,

& Book Curserer Library.
•§lHealth§r: 24
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.3
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lPossible drops§r: Book, Cursed Eye, Book of Curses, Enchanted Book, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Players, Creeper, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Tree Guardians.

•§lAggressive toward§r: Players, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Tree Guardians, Villager, & Players aggressive tamed mobs.
•Can summon 3-4 §lCursed Flying Book§r §o(92% chance)§r, §lEnchanted Flying Book§r §o(4% chance)§r, or

§lFlying Book§r §o(4% chance)§r around its self.
•Can transform a normal §lFlying Book§r into a §lCursed Flying Book§r.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘The Book Curserer roams libraries and ruins, commanding cursed books and turning knowledge itself into a weapon. They are feared for their ability to animate books into deadly magical constructs.
